metadata.title: Industrial Storage Tanks | Welltech®
metadata.description: Heavy-duty stainless steel tank manufacturing for high-volume chemical and food storage at ASME and CE standards.

hero.title: Industrial Storage Tanks
hero.desc: Long-lasting stainless solutions with high leak-tightness and zero oxidation guarantee at international standards (ASME, EN 14015, API 650) for the heart of your facility.

engineering.title: Heavy-Duty Engineering
engineering.desc: Safely storing high-volume liquids, raw materials, or semi-finished products is vital for the sustainability of your factory. Welltech® Storage Tanks are sized with advanced 3D simulation tests against the specific gravity (viscosity) of the fluid inside and wind/seismic loads. Each welding point is certified with Non-Destructive Testing (NDT) methods to ensure maximum strength.

items.2: Capacity-Specific TIG and Plasma Robotic Welding Technology
items.3: Full Compliance with API 650 and EN 14015 Standards
items.4: Conical, Dished, or Sloped Flat Custom Bottom Options
items.5: High Pressure, Wind, and Seismic Load Resistance
items.6: Level Control, Ventilation, and CIP Wash Ball Integration

capacityTable.title: Standard Production Capacities
capacityTable.note: * The dimensions given (Diameter x Height) are approximate values. Millimetric revisions can be made according to your facility's space constraints.
capacityTable.onSite: On-Site installation service is provided for tanks of this capacity and above.

items.q: How do you deliver tanks that are larger than our factory doors?
items.a: Large-diameter and high-volume (over 100,000 L) tanks are prepared modularly in our facility and assembled on-site by our expert welding engineers.

items.q: What is the difference between Food and Chemical storage?
items.a: While smooth surface quality (Ra < 0.6) and CIP washing lines are critical in food tanks; Duplex steels with high corrosion resistance and ATEX equipment are preferred in chemical tanks like acid or solvent.

spec.title: Technical Specification
spec.subtitle: PDF DOCUMENT
spec.desc: You can download the technical specification file containing material thicknesses, welding procedures, and quality standards.

reference.desc: Check out our 500,000 Liter Mega Storage project completed last year.

cta.title: Need a Custom Size?
cta.desc: Let's calculate the optimal maximum capacity for the empty space (height/width) in your facility together with our engineers.
